scope: aigol conversation routing visibility to workflow dispatch path
observed_prompt_summary: Commercial Sapianta product opportunity prompt requesting findings, assumptions, alternatives, risks, uncertainties, provider disagreements, clarification questions, confidence, milestone, commercialization path, reasoning, and cognition output only.

route_trace.result: OCS_LLM_COGNITION and OPERATOR_DECISION_SUPPORT can both be candidates
operator decision support is moved behind OCS for visibility when OCS predicate is true
visibility_only true, authority_granted false, provider_invoked false
operator decision-support branch executed before OCS branch
OCS branch is later in the cascade and is skipped once operator support matches

route_trace.transition: Operator support runtime generated observed result

review_questions.provider_invoked_false_explanation: The executed runtime was operator_decision_support_runtime, whose replay reconstruction returns provider_invoked false.
review_questions.providers_none_interpretation: For this observed path, providers NONE corroborates that OCS cognition did not execute when combined with the operator_decision_support replay and Recommendation Generated result.

findings.title: Displayed workflow is not dispatch authority
findings.root_cause: CONVERSATIONAL_ROUTING_VISIBILITY_ARTIFACT_V1 is rendered before dispatch but is not consumed by the dispatch cascade.

findings.title: Routing visibility priority diverges from dispatch priority
findings.root_cause: Visibility moves OPERATOR_DECISION_SUPPORT behind OCS when OCS matches; dispatch checks operator decision support before OCS.

findings.title: Operator decision-support output is correct for the branch actually executed
findings.root_cause: The output signature matches render_operator_decision_support_summary and operator_decision_support replay reconstruction.

findings.title: OCS cognition runtime did not fail in this trace
findings.root_cause: The OCS dispatch branch and _run_conversational_ocs_llm_cognition were not reached.

findings.title: ROUTING DECISION heading implies execution selection
findings.root_cause: The rendered routing block does not clearly distinguish visibility-only route explanation from actual workflow dispatch authority.

root_cause_summary: Duplicate independent routing systems: routing visibility selected OCS for display, while the runtime dispatch cascade independently matched and executed operator decision support first.
conclusive_answer: The CLI displayed workflow OCS_LLM_COGNITION because the routing visibility artifact selected it, but produced operator_decision_support output because actual dispatch ignored that artifact and entered the earlier operator decision-support branch.
